questions.question: Which of the following is an efficient way to organise files on a computer?
questions.option_1: Store all files in the Recycle Bin
questions.option_2: Rename all files with random characters
questions.option_3: Create different folders based on categories of files
questions.option_4: Keep all files in the same folder

questions.question: What does the Alt + Tab keyboard shortcut do in Windows?
How can you access menus in the menu bar in Windows?
questions.option_1: Press F5 to open the menu bar.
questions.option_2: Press Alt and the letter underlined in the menu title to access a menu.
questions.option_3: Press Ctrl + M to open the menu.
questions.option_4: Right-click on the title bar to open the menu bar.

questions.question: In most software applications, what does Ctrl + S do if pressed multiple times?
questions.option_1: Updates the saved file without creating a new one
questions.option_4: Saves a new copy each time

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Control Unit within a CPU?
questions.option_3: Directing the flow of instructions and data

questions.question: What is required when creating a file or folder?
What does the abbreviation ASCII stand for?
questions.option_1: American Standard Code for Information Interchange
questions.option_4: Automated System for Computer Integrated Information

questions.question: What does the 'Ctrl + V' shortcut key do?
questions.option_1: It cuts the selected text or files.
questions.option_2: It copies the selected text or files.
questions.option_3: It pastes the copied text or files.

questions.question: Which type of ROM can be programmed only once after manufacturing?
What is the function of device drivers in an operating system?
questions.option_2: To manage communication between OS and hardware

questions.question: Which of the following steps correctly describes how to move a file or folder using the Cut and Paste method?
questions.option_1: Select file → Press Ctrl + C → Go to new location → Press Delete
questions.option_2: Open file → Click Close → Open Recycle Bin​​​​
questions.option_3: Select file → Edit → Cut or Ctrl + X → Go to new location → Edit → Paste or Ctrl + V
questions.option_4: Select file → Right-click → Copy → Go to new location → Right-click → Paste

questions.question: Which of the following steps correctly describes how to rename a file or folder using the File menu?
questions.option_1: Open the folder → Click View → Rename → Type new name
questions.option_2: Select the file/folder → Click File → Rename → Type new name → Press Enter
questions.option_3: Select the folder → Press Delete → Type new name
questions.option_4: Right-click the folder → Select Copy → Rename

questions.question: Which shortcut key combination is used to save a file quickly?
Select the INCORRECT operating system used in computers and laptops.
What does GUI stand for in an operating system context?
Which keyboard shortcut allows you to select multiple specific files or folders at once?
How can you create a new folder in Windows?
In some file management programs, which shortcut key combination is used to copy a selected item instead of moving it?
Which of the following options best describes the main function of an operating system?
questions.option_1: Managing computer hardware and software resources

questions.question: Which MS Windows feature allows users to personalize their desktop background, theme and screensaver settings?
In Windows 11, what does the Alt + D keyboard shortcut do in File Explorer or a web browser?
questions.option_2: Deletes the selected file or folder

questions.question: Which of the following shortcut keys is used to switch between open applications in Windows?
What happens when user right-clicks on an empty area of the MS Windows desktop?
questions.option_1: A context menu with view and display settings is opened.

questions.question: What is the correct way to rename a file or folder using the right mouse button?
questions.option_1: Left-click on the file → Press Delete → Type new name
questions.option_2: Double-click on the file → Type new name
questions.option_3: Right-click on the desktop → Select New → Rename
questions.option_4: Right-click on the file → Select Rename → Type new name → Press Enter

questions.question: In a LAN setup, which of the following statements is true?
questions.option_1: LAN connects computers within a limited area like a home or office.
questions.option_2: LAN cannot share printers or files between devices.
questions.option_4: LAN is used to connect computers over a large geographical area.
